svg.title: DMX Lyre Controller — Wiring Diagram
svg.desc: XIAO RP2040 + XBee S1 + 3-Axis Joystick + OLED SSD1306 + 8-Button Resistor Ladder
svg.text: XIAO RP2040 · XBee S1 · 3-Axis Joystick · OLED SSD1306 · 8-Button Resistor Ladder

g.text: Each button → unique voltage → unique ADC reading

svg.text: PIN SUMMARY: A0→Joy X · A1→Joy Y · A2→Joy Z · A3→8 Buttons · D4→SDA · D5→SCL · D6/TX→XBee DIN · D7/RX→XBee DOUT
